text: Jurnal Agama and Reform Islam Universitas Islom Nusantara JURIS ABSTRACT Improving Human Characteristics through Deeds of Piety (iman) is known as the implementation of piety. Taqwa in the Qur'an relates to human personality towards Allah, which in the implementation of piety turns humans into very obedient servants by obeying all the commandments of Allah SWT and always avoiding His prohibitions. Thus, this study aims at the way to implement taqwa devotion through the explanation of Islam conducted by Buya Hamka according to his interpretation of Al-Azhar Book. This study is qualitative research using library research method in which the main source of data is Al-Azhar Book reinforced with secondary data in the form of literature, scientific papers and journals. The result of the study reveals that, in Buya Hamka's explanation, taqwa is not limited to only fear of Allah from imposing His wrath, but has a wider meaning which is that taqwa is known as a muhasabah in spirit of worship that aims at increasing acts of piety so that a servant becomes more obedient towards Allah as well as to increase mutual love and care towards other humans. Therefore, to implement taqwa consists of two aspects, namely habluminallah and hablumminnas that have the interpretations as explained above. Key words: Taqwa; Deeds of Piety (Iman), Habluminallah and Hablumminnas.
